name: Sports Challenge America
address: 28120 Race Track Rd, Bonita Springs, FL 34135
about: Sports Challenge America is a multifaceted entertainment venue offering a wide range of indoor and outdoor activities, including golf simulators, bowling, basketball, pickleball, and various sports simulators. The facility provides a one-of-a-kind experience for sports fans of all ages and skill levels, combining the thrill of multiple sports under one roof. It features both indoor and outdoor spaces, including private simulator rooms, a dedicated outdoor sports bar, and amenities suitable for casual outings, parties, corporate events, and league play.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulators in private rooms
60-foot all-weather synthetic putting green for practice
Combination of virtual golf simulation and physical putting challenge
Ability to watch live sports on a giant screen while playing

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu of food and drink selections available for purchase, including comfort food with a twist
Wide variety of mixed drinks, beers, and wine available for guests aged 21 and over

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether golf clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own. It's recommended to contact the venue directly to confirm club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks to the facility?
faq.answer: Outside food and beverages are not permitted inside the facility. However, cakes and cupcakes are allowed for birthday parties or special celebrations with prior notice.

faq.question: How long does it take to play a full round of golf on the simulators?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the average time for a full round of golf. For private simulator bay rentals, you can book for up to 5 hours, which would include time for watching games and playing simulations.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sports Challenge America is family-friendly and offers birthday packages designed especially for kids. These packages include access to bowling lanes, sports simulators, and interactive games tailored for all ages. There are also free amenities like pool table, ping pong, corn hole and foosball.
